info.title: AccuFinance API
info.description: REST API for the AccuFinance Manufacturing ERP system — designed for Make-to-Order (MTO) garment production. All financial transactions use double-entry accounting with live balance derivation from journal entries. Import into Postman, Insomnia, or any OpenAPI-compatible tool.

tags.name: Designs
tags.description: Garment design management with multi-size BOM

tags.name: Accounting
tags.description: Opening balances, expenses, assets, liabilities, VAT

bearerAuth.description: API key set via Vercel env var (API_SECRET or NEXTAUTH_SECRET). Use for Postman, curl, scripts.

cookieAuth.name: next-auth.session-token
cookieAuth.description: NextAuth session cookie from browser login.

get.description: Returns aggregated KPI data: total revenue, orders, work order status, top customers, inventory alerts, and monthly revenue trend.

post.description: Creates an inventory item with optional journal entry for purchase recording.
Adjust quantity and create a journal entry for the adjustment.
Creates a sales order with accounting journal entry.

put.description: If status='producing', auto-creates work order with design costs.

post.description: Manually trigger sync of website orders to the accounting system.
Creates invoice with revenue and COGS journal entries (double-entry).
Records a payment against an invoice and creates a journal entry within a Firestore transaction.

get.summary: List all work orders with designs

post.description: Auto-calculates costs from design or from order items.

get.summary: Get work order with design and material requirements

post.summary: Full update: reverse old + apply new materials/labor/overhead
Update single work order costs from design
Batch auto-cost for all work orders
Ensure all work orders have costs calculated
Batch update work order costs (skips if already has cost)

get.summary: Get material requirements with availability check
Get all accounts with live balances
get.description: Returns all accounts with balances derived live from journal entries.

post.description: Initializes the full chart from the system constant + fiscal periods. Admin only.
Creates a manual double-entry journal entry. Validates balanced entry (debits = credits) and fiscal period.

400.description: Unbalanced entry or closed fiscal period

post.summary: Sync account balances from journal entries

post.description: Creates journal entries OB-01 through OB-GEN for all opening balances.
Updates status, completes work orders, generates invoices and AR/COGS journal entries.
Closes income/expense accounts to retained earnings. Admin only.

get.description: Fetches orders/returns from website collections mapped to sales order format.

post.description: Authenticated via x-webhook-secret header. Syncs to sales orders, creates work orders on 'processing' status.
On 'completed' status, processes return through accounting.

get.summary: Sync orders and process overdue invoices
